name: Pumpkin Dump Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the first eight ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Pour the mixture into a 13x9 inch baking pan, spreading it evenly.
3. Sprinkle the yellow cake mix evenly over the pumpkin mixture.
4. Sprinkle chopped pecans evenly over the cake mix.
5. Pour the melted margarine evenly over the top of the pecans.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour (or longer). Ovens vary, so keep an eye on the time.
7. Serve with Cool Whip on top.
